standings.statement: Leading Section C through consistent performance across sport, culture, and scholarship.
Balanced results across academic and literary competitions this term.
Notable strength in cultural events and collective house participation.
Steady academic contribution with growing presence in inter-house sport.

highlights.title: Inter-house sport
highlights.text: Ashoka House leads the standings following the inter-house sports championship and Science Olympiad.

highlights.title: Cultural recognition
highlights.text: Tagore House holds the overall cultural festival trophy; standings reflect participation across all Section C houses.

highlights.title: Scholarship
highlights.text: Points are awarded for documented participation and placement in sanctioned inter-house events only.
